policy_yaml:
version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule opencode-package-tests:
    notify exec "bun" "test" if AGENT
    because "Run bun test from packages/opencode, not from the repository root."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule opencode-single-test:
    notify exec "bun" "tool-define.test.ts" if AGENT
    because "Run the single test from packages/opencode: bun test ./test/tool/tool-define.test.ts."

version: 1
policy: |
  source BUILD = file "packages/opencode/**"
  
  rule kilo-artifact-size-check:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if BUILD unless after exec "du" since write "packages/opencode/**"
    because "After the single CLI build, check dist output with du -h dist/*/*/bin/kilo."

version: 1
policy: |
  source SERVER = file "packages/opencode/src/server/**"
  
  rule sdk-regen-after-server:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if SERVER unless after exec "generate.ts" since write "packages/opencode/src/server/**"
    because "After server endpoint changes, run ./script/generate.ts from root to regenerate packages/sdk/js."

version: 1
policy: |
  source VSCODE = file "packages/kilo-vscode/**"
  
  rule knip-before-push:
    notify exec "git" "push" if VSCODE unless after exec "bun" since write "packages/kilo-vscode/**"
    because "Run bun run knip from packages/kilo-vscode and remove or unexport unused exports before pushing."

version: 1
policy: |
  source LINKS = file "packages/kilo-vscode/**"
  source LINKS = file "packages/kilo-vscode/webview-ui/**"
  source LINKS = file "packages/opencode/src/**"
  
  rule source-links-refresh:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if LINKS unless after exec "bun" since write "packages/kilo-vscode/**" or write "packages/kilo-vscode/webview-ui/**" or write "packages/opencode/src/**"
    because "After URL changes, run bun run script/extract-source-links.ts and commit packages/kilo-docs/source-links.md."

version: 1
policy: |
  source KILO = file "packages/kilo-vscode/**"
  source KILO = file "packages/kilo-ui/**"
  
  rule kilocode-change-marker-check:
    notify exec "git" "push" if KILO unless after exec "bun" since write "packages/kilo-vscode/**" or write "packages/kilo-ui/**"
    because "Run check-kilocode-change and remove kilocode_change markers from Kilo-owned packages before pushing."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule opencode-annotation-check:
    notify write file "packages/opencode/src/**" if AGENT unless target "packages/opencode/src/kilocode/**"
    notify write file "packages/opencode/test/**" if AGENT unless target "packages/opencode/test/kilocode/**"
    because "Shared opencode changes need kilocode_change annotations; kilocode-named paths are exempt."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule workflow-allowlist:
    notify write file ".github/workflows/**" if AGENT
    notify unlink file ".github/workflows/**" if AGENT
    because "Reflect workflow additions or removals in script/check-workflows.ts."

version: 1
policy: |
  source CHANGE = file "packages/**"
  
  rule smallest-relevant-checks:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if CHANGE unless after exec "bun" since write "packages/**"
    because "Before saying ready, run the smallest relevant lint, typecheck, and test checks for touched packages."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-root-bun-test:
    notify exec "bun" "test" if AGENT
    because "Never run root bun test; use package-level tests such as packages/opencode instead."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule extension-settings-location:
    notify write file ".vscode/settings.json" if AGENT
    notify write file "packages/kilo-vscode/**" if AGENT
    because "Extension-specific settings belong in Kilo extension settings unless intentionally VS Code-wide."

version: 1
policy: |
  source GUIDE = file "packages/kilo-jetbrains/AGENTS.md"
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule jetbrains-guide-first:
    notify write file "packages/kilo-jetbrains/**" if AGENT and not GUIDE
    because "Read packages/kilo-jetbrains/AGENTS.md before planning or editing JetBrains plugin work."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule current-workdir-only:
    notify write file "**" if AGENT
    because "Make changes only in the current working directory, never in the main checkout of a worktree."

version: 1
policy: |
  source USER_CHANGE = file "packages/**"
  
  rule changeset-required:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if USER_CHANGE unless after exec "bunx" since write "packages/**"
    because "User-facing features, fixes, or breaking changes require a changeset file before commit."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule opencode-shared-last-resort:
    notify write file "packages/opencode/**" if AGENT unless target "packages/opencode/src/kilocode/**"
    because "Prefer Kilo-specific paths and minimize changes to shared OpenCode files."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule prefer-kilocode-directories:
    notify write file "packages/opencode/src/**" if AGENT unless target "packages/opencode/src/kilocode/**"
    notify write file "packages/opencode/test/**" if AGENT unless target "packages/opencode/test/kilocode/**"
    because "Place Kilo-specific source and tests in kilocode directories whenever possible."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule documented-dev-command:
    notify exec "bun" "dev" if AGENT
    notify exec "bun" "src/index.ts" if AGENT
    because "Use the documented dev commands from root or packages/opencode."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule avoid-upstream-restructure:
    notify write file "packages/opencode/**" if AGENT unless target "packages/opencode/src/kilocode/**"
    notify unlink file "packages/opencode/**" if AGENT
    because "Avoid refactoring or reorganizing upstream opencode code unless absolutely necessary."

version: 1
policy: |
  source CONFIG = file "packages/opencode/src/config/config.ts"
  
  rule mirror-config-cloud-schema:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if CONFIG
    notify write file "packages/opencode/src/config/config.ts" if CONFIG
    because "When adding a kilocode_change Config.Info key, also mirror it to the cloud config JSON schema."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule dev-with-help-params:
    notify exec "bun" "dev" if AGENT
    because "For dev with params, use bun dev -- help."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule extension-dev-command:
    notify exec "bun" "extension" if AGENT
    because "Use bun run extension for the VS Code extension; pass --no-build when intentionally skipping build."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule typecheck-tsgo-java:
    notify exec "bun" "typecheck" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "java"
    kill exec "tsc" if AGENT
    because "Typecheck uses bun turbo typecheck with tsgo; check Java 21 before running it."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule upstream-public-api-only:
    notify write file "**/site-packages/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "vendor/**" if AGENT
    because "Call upstream tools through public APIs or CLIs; do not hack internals."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-upstream-source-edits:
    block write file "vendor/**" if AGENT
    block write file "third_party/**" if AGENT
    block write file "external/**" if AGENT
    because "Never modify upstream open source project source code."

version: 1
policy: |
  source VERSION = file "pyproject.toml"
  source VERSION = file "agent_reach/__init__.py"
  source VERSION = file "tests/test_cli.py"
  
  rule version-three-place-match:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if VERSION
    because "Keep the version matched in pyproject.toml, agent_reach/__init__.py, and tests/test_cli.py."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-direct-main-push:
    notify exec "git" "push" if AGENT
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT
    because "Work on a new branch, open a PR to main, and never push directly to main."

version: 1
policy: |
  source CODE = file "agent_reach/**"
  source CODE = file "tests/**"
  
  rule pytest-before-commit:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if CODE unless after exec "pytest" since write "agent_reach/**" or write "tests/**"
    because "Run pytest tests/ -v before committing; all tests must pass."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule cookie-editor-auth-only:
    notify write file "config/**" if AGENT
    notify write file ".env" if AGENT
    because "For Twitter and XHS cookie auth, use Cookie-Editor browser export only; do not use QR scan."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule xhs-cookie-editor-only:
    notify exec "python" "login" if AGENT
    notify write file "config/**" if AGENT
    because "For XHS login, use Cookie-Editor browser export only; QR login can hang."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule documented-agent-reach-commands:
    notify exec "pip" "install" if AGENT
    notify exec "pytest" if AGENT
    notify exec "bash" "test.sh" if AGENT
    notify exec "python" "agent_reach.cli" if AGENT
    because "Use the documented install, pytest, integration, doctor, and install commands."

version: 1
policy: |
  source CODE = file "src/**"
  source CODE = file "crates/**"
  
  rule openfang-build-verify:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if CODE unless after exec "cargo" since write "src/**" or write "crates/**"
    because "After each feature, run cargo build --workspace --lib, cargo test --workspace, and cargo clippy with warnings denied."

version: 1
policy: |
  source API = file "src/**"
  source API = file "crates/**"
  source API = file "static/**"
  
  rule live-integration-after-wiring:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if API unless after exec "curl" since write "src/**" or write "crates/**" or write "static/**"
    because "After new endpoints, features, or wiring changes, run live integration tests, not unit tests alone."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule live-test-steps:
    kill exec "openfang.exe" "daemon" if AGENT
    notify exec "cargo" "openfang-cli" if AGENT
    notify exec "curl" if AGENT
    because "Follow the live integration test flow: stop daemon, build release CLI, start with start, curl endpoints, verify side effects, then clean up."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule do-not-touch-openfang-cli:
    block write file "**/openfang-cli/**" if AGENT
    because "Do not touch openfang-cli; the user is actively building the interactive CLI."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule route-registration-pair:
    notify write file "**/server.rs" if AGENT
    notify write file "**/routes.rs" if AGENT
    because "New routes must be registered in server.rs and implemented in routes.rs."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule documented-local-commands:
    notify exec "python" "src.app" if AGENT
    notify exec "uvicorn" "src.app:app" if AGENT
    notify exec "python" "spider_v2.py" if AGENT
    notify exec "npm" if AGENT
    notify exec "docker" "compose" if AGENT
    because "Use the documented backend, spider, frontend, start.sh, and Docker commands for local development."

version: 1
policy: |
  source CODE = file "src/**"
  source CODE = file "tests/**"
  
  rule pytest-relevant-before-pr:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if CODE unless after exec "pytest" since write "src/**" or write "tests/**"
    because "Run relevant pytest checks and add focused tests for new logic before PR."

version: 1
policy: |
  source SECRET = file ".env"
  source SECRET = file "state.json"
  source SECRET = file "**/*cookie*"
  
  rule no-real-secrets-commit:
    block exec "git" "commit" if SECRET
    notify write file ".env" if SECRET
    because "Do not commit real credentials or cookies such as .env or state.json; change default production auth."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-git-stash:
    kill exec "git" "stash" if AGENT
    because "Do not create, apply, or drop git stash entries unless explicitly requested."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-git-worktree:
    kill exec "git" "worktree" if AGENT
    because "Do not create, remove, or modify git worktree checkouts unless explicitly requested."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-branch-switch:
    kill exec "git" "checkout" if AGENT
    kill exec "git" "switch" if AGENT
    because "Do not switch branches or check out a different branch unless explicitly requested."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule push-without-discarding-work:
    kill exec "git" "reset" if AGENT
    kill exec "git" "clean" if AGENT
    notify exec "git" "push" if AGENT
    because "Before push, integrate with git pull --rebase if needed and never discard in-progress work."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule commit-scope:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT
    because "When asked to commit, commit only your changes; commit all means grouped chunks of everything."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule formatting-only-diffs:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT
    because "If staged and unstaged diffs are formatting-only, resolve them without asking."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule formatting-followup-same-commit:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT
    notify exec "git" "push" if AGENT
    because "If commit or push was already requested, include formatting-only follow-up changes in the same commit when practical."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule dependency-approval-required:
    block write file "pyproject.toml" if AGENT
    block write file "uv.lock" if AGENT
    block write file "requirements*.txt" if AGENT
    because "Dependency updates, overrides, vendoring, or version bumps require explicit approval."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule use-uv-not-python:
    kill exec "python" if AGENT
    kill exec "python3" if AGENT
    kill exec "pip" if AGENT
    notify exec "uv" if AGENT
    because "Use uv run and uv pip; do not use python, python3, or pip directly unless the user asks."

version: 1
policy: |
  source CODE = file "**/*.go"
  
  rule feature-unit-tests:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if CODE unless after exec "go" since write "**/*.go"
    because "All new features must include unit tests before commit."

version: 1
policy: |
  source CODE = file "**/*.go"
  
  rule bugfix-regression-test:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if CODE unless after exec "go" since write "**/*.go"
    because "Bug fixes should include a regression test before commit."

version: 1
policy: |
  source CODE = file "**/*.go"
  
  rule go-test-before-commit:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if CODE unless after exec "go" since write "**/*.go"
    because "Run go test ./... before committing; tests must pass."

version: 1
policy: |
  source CODE = file "**/*.go"
  source I18N = file "i18n/**"
  
  rule precommit-checklist:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if CODE unless after exec "go" since write "**/*.go"
    notify write file "core/*.go" if CODE
    notify exec "git" "commit" if I18N
    because "Before commit, run go build, go test, avoid new hardcoded platform or agent names in core, and complete i18n."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule new-platform-checklist:
    notify write file "platform/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "cmd/cc-connect/**" if AGENT
    because "A new platform needs platform implementation, core registration in init, config, docs, tests, and i18n."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule new-agent-checklist:
    notify write file "agent/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "cmd/cc-connect/**" if AGENT
    because "A new agent needs agent implementation, core registration in init, plugin CLI wiring, config, docs, tests, and i18n."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule bun-runtime-only:
    kill exec "npm" if AGENT
    kill exec "yarn" if AGENT
    kill exec "pnpm" if AGENT
    because "Runtime is Bun only; never use npm, yarn, or pnpm."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-commit-without-request:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT
    because "Never commit unless explicitly requested."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-direct-bun-publish:
    kill exec "bun" "publish" if AGENT
    because "Never run bun publish directly; use the GitHub Actions workflow."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-local-package-version-edit:
    block write file "package.json" if AGENT
    because "Never modify package.json version locally; the publish workflow handles it."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source READ = file "**"
  
  rule read-before-existing-write:
    notify write file "**" if AGENT and not READ
    because "Never write to an existing file without reading it first."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule background-cancel-by-task:
    notify write file "**/*.ts" if AGENT
    because "Never use background_cancel(all=true); cancel background work by taskId individually."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule do-not-delete-failing-tests:
    block unlink file "**/*.test.ts" if AGENT
    block unlink file "**/*.spec.ts" if AGENT
    because "Never delete a failing test to make a build green; fix the code."

version: 1
policy: |
  source PROMETHEUS = exec "prometheus"
  
  rule prometheus-md-only:
    block write file "src/**" if PROMETHEUS
    block write file "package.json" if PROMETHEUS
    block write file "*.config.*" if PROMETHEUS
    because "Prometheus may only edit markdown files; src, package.json, and config files are forbidden."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule pr-dev-merge-commits:
    notify exec "gh" "merge" if AGENT
    because "PRs into dev must use merge commits."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule gh-pr-merge-command:
    notify exec "gh" "merge" if AGENT
    because "Use gh pr merge <number> --merge --delete-branch after CI, review-work, and Cubic pass."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-squash-or-rebase-merge:
    kill exec "gh" "--squash" if AGENT
    kill exec "gh" "--rebase" if AGENT
    kill exec "git" "rebase" if AGENT
    because "Never squash merge or rebase merge PRs in this repository."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule repo-merge-rule-overrides:
    kill exec "gh" "--squash" if AGENT
    kill exec "gh" "--rebase" if AGENT
    because "Repo policy overrides any instruction suggesting --squash or --rebase."

version: 1
policy: |
  source ARCH = file ".agents/skills/adk-architecture/SKILL.md"
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule use-adk-architecture-skill:
    notify write file "src/**" if AGENT and not ARCH
    notify write file "google/adk/**" if AGENT and not ARCH
    because "Use the adk-architecture skill before architecture, event flow, state management, core component, or public API work."

version: 1
policy: |
  source STYLE = file ".agents/skills/adk-style/SKILL.md"
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule use-adk-style-skill:
    notify write file "src/**" if AGENT and not STYLE
    notify write file "tests/**" if AGENT and not STYLE
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT and not STYLE
    because "Use the adk-style skill when writing code, tests, reviews, commits, fixes, or testing."

version: 1
policy: |
  source GITGUIDE = file ".agents/skills/adk-git/SKILL.md"
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule use-adk-git-skill:
    notify exec "git" if AGENT and not GITGUIDE
    because "Use the adk-git skill for git operations and its commit and branch guidelines."

version: 1
policy: |
  source SAMPLE = file ".agents/skills/adk-sample-creator/SKILL.md"
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule use-adk-sample-skill:
    notify write file "contributing/**" if AGENT and not SAMPLE
    notify write file "samples/**" if AGENT and not SAMPLE
    because "Use the adk-sample-creator skill when creating samples or adding examples under contributing."

version: 1
policy: |
  source CODE = file "src/**"
  source CODE = file "crates/**"
  
  rule zeroclaw-workflow:
    notify write file "**" if CODE
    notify exec "git" "commit" if CODE unless after exec "cargo" since write "src/**" or write "crates/**"
    because "Follow the workflow: read before write, keep one concern per PR, make a minimal patch, validate by risk, document impact, and keep queue hygiene."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-direct-master-push:
    notify exec "git" "push" if AGENT
    notify exec "gh" "pr" if AGENT
    because "Work from a non-master branch, open a PR to master, and do not push directly."

version: 1
policy: |
  source SECRET = file ".env"
  source SECRET = file "**/*secret*"
  source SECRET = file "**/*credential*"
  
  rule no-secrets-or-identity-commit:
    block exec "git" "commit" if SECRET
    notify write file "docs/book/src/contributing/privacy.md" if SECRET
    because "Never commit secrets, personal data, or real identity information; follow the privacy guide."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-heavy-deps:
    notify write file "Cargo.toml" if AGENT
    notify write file "Cargo.lock" if AGENT
    because "Do not add heavy dependencies for minor convenience."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule single-source-of-truth:
    notify write file "src/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "crates/**/src/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "**/*config*" if AGENT
    because "No duplicate state: reference the canonical source of truth instead of copying facts into new fields, structs, config, schema, or caches."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-silent-security-weakening:
    notify write file "crates/zeroclaw-runtime/src/security/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "crates/zeroclaw-gateway/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "**/*access*" if AGENT
    because "Do not silently weaken security policy or access constraints."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-format-functional-mix:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT
    because "Do not mix massive formatting-only changes with functional changes."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-unrelated-modules:
    notify write file "**" if AGENT
    because "Do not modify unrelated modules while here."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-bypass-failing-checks:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT
    notify exec "git" "push" if AGENT
    because "Do not bypass failing checks without explicit explanation."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-sensitive-test-doc-data:
    notify write file "tests/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "docs/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "examples/**" if AGENT
    because "Do not include personal identity or sensitive information in tests, examples, docs, or commits."

version: 1
policy: |
  source CODE = file "src/**"
  source CODE = file "crates/**"
  
  rule dry-check-before-push:
    notify exec "git" "push" if CODE unless after exec "ci.sh" since write "src/**" or write "crates/**"
    because "Duplicate state is automatic-revert-on-detect; run dev/ci.sh dry-check before pushing."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule protected-dev-contract-files:
    block unlink file "docs/book/src/contributing/pr-review-protocol.md" if AGENT
    block unlink file "docs/book/src/maintainers/changelog-generation.md" if AGENT
    block unlink file "docs/book/src/maintainers/reviewer-playbook.md" if AGENT
    block unlink file "docs/book/src/maintainers/pr-workflow.md" if AGENT
    block unlink file "docs/book/src/contributing/privacy.md" if AGENT
    block unlink file "docs/book/src/foundations/fnd-00*.md" if AGENT
    because "Do not move or delete dev-operational contract files without updating consuming skills and AGENTS.md."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule source-of-truth-preedit:
    notify write file "src/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "crates/**/src/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "**/*config*" if AGENT
    because "Before adding fields or config entries, state whether this is the source of truth or a duplicate, then resolve from the canonical source."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule documented-cargo-checks:
    notify exec "cargo" "fmt" if AGENT
    notify exec "cargo" "clippy" if AGENT
    notify exec "cargo" "test" if AGENT
    because "Use the documented cargo fmt check, cargo clippy with warnings denied, and cargo test commands."

version: 1
policy: |
  source CODE = file "src/**"
  source CODE = file "crates/**"
  
  rule full-prepr-validation:
    notify exec "git" "push" if CODE unless after exec "ci.sh" since write "src/**" or write "crates/**"
    because "For full pre-PR validation, run ./dev/ci.sh all."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule docs-and-bootstrap-checks:
    notify write file "docs/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "install.sh" if AGENT
    because "Docs-only changes need markdown lint and link checks; touching install.sh needs bash -n install.sh."
